_note: Boba Night events data — SERIES / OCCURRENCE model. Source of truth for /meetups/, build/shop-events.json, and meetups/ics/*. Rule: cadence_rrule is null unless the organizer publishes a fixed recurring day; occurrences[] holds ONLY dates verifiable from a source — never guessed. shop_slugs match directory slugs only where a real host association is documented. Research: docs/MEETUPS-RESEARCH-12JUL26.md.

series.title: SoCal Boba Run Club
series.vibe: In their own words, “no running, just vibes.” Boba crawls, mahjong nights, and sober raves that take over 626 tea bars for a few hundred people.
series.cadence_text: Events post on Partiful, no fixed day

series.title: SGV Boba Mahjong Club
series.vibe: Mahjong nights run inside a working tea bar. Recent editions ran Saturday evenings, and the tiles move fast.
host_venues: Summerfield Tea Bar, 9021 Valley Blvd, Rosemead

series.title: Boba Buddies LA
series.vibe: Order at a shop (past picks include Junbi, Just Boba, and Sunright), then find a spot nearby and actually talk, sometimes over board games.

series.title: Boba Tea Social Club
series.vibe: Two-thousand-plus members meet roughly monthly at the shops orbiting Convoy, Tea N More on Clairemont Mesa Blvd among them.

series.title: Silent Book Club, Irvine
series.vibe: Order a drink at One Zo Boba, read silently for forty-five minutes alongside a few thousand fellow members, then talk about it. This is the rare club where showing up alone is the point.
host_venues: One Zo Boba, Woodbury Town Center, Irvine

series.title: Pasadena Boba Trail
series.vibe: The city's official digital passport across 29 shops. Check in along Route 66, collect points, and earn boba-themed prizes on your own clock.

series.title: Run 4 Boba 5K
series.vibe: The one entry where running is actually involved. Finish a 5K anywhere, then reward yourself with boba from your favorite shop.

occurrences.note: Virtual 5K — date listed on the race page at last check

series.title: The K-pop cupsleeve circuit
series.vibe: Fan-organized celebrations around idol birthdays and comebacks: collectible cup sleeves with any drink, artist alley, and raffles, rotating through boba shops across LA and OC.
series.cadence_text: Around idol birthdays and comebacks, no fixed schedule

series.title: Sunright Tea Studio collab meetups
series.vibe: The chain runs sanctioned crossovers, like Honkai Star Rail with voice actors and MapleStory pop-ups, that turn a store into a fan meetup for a weekend.
series.cadence_text: During official collab runs, check the collab page
